name: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc.
business: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a REIT that invests primarily in high RevPAR luxury hotels and resorts. It does not operate hotels directly but contracts with management companies. Revenue is generated from transient, group, and contract sales at its 13 properties.

exposures.sentence: We are an externally-advised Maryland corporation formed in 2013 that invests primarily in high revenue per available room (RevPAR) luxury hotels and resorts.
